raw_description:
Located on the Manama seafront, this luxury hotel features an air-conditioned squash court and flood-lit tennis courts on the beach. It has an on-site shopping section with 6 designer boutiques.

Each room at The Ritz-Carlton boasts 600-threadcount linen and offers 3 different types of pillows. Each room features interactive flat-screen TV with access to multilingual satellite channels.

Ritz-Carlton Bahrain’s spa offers variety of beauty treatments including its signature massages. Guests can stretch their muscles using the fitness centre’s cardio-vascular stations and resistance machines.

Overlooking the landscaped gardens, Primavera serves light Italian dishes which include fine appetizers and gourmet dishes. Burlington Club features a well-stocked cigar collection as well as vintage wines and cognacs.

Ritz-Carlton Bahrain Hotel is a 25-minute drive from Bahrain International Airport. It is less than 10 km from Bahrain Museum, one of the largest museums in the country.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.4for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at The Ritz-Carlton, Bahrain. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 11 key amenities including 2 swimming pools, Free WiFi, Family rooms.
